segments.text: Somehow eking out altitude with that sneaky tech!
segments.original_text: なんとか高度を稼いでる裏戦術

segments.text: Crossing the platform is also super nerve-wracking!
segments.original_text: 台上を渡るのも非常に怖い

segments.text: Chains dair straight into forward smash!
segments.original_text: 空下からそのまま横スマッシュで繋いできる

full_text: Somehow eking out altitude with that sneaky tech! Falling nair Scattered attack whiff Crossing the platform is also super nerve-wracking! Chains dair straight into forward smash!

corrections.original: クエしたからそのまま横スマッシュで繋いできる
corrections.corrected: 空下からそのまま横スマッシュで繋いできる
